title: GModPack
description: simple mod pack for vanilla playing
body:
🚀 My Minecraft Client Mod Pack!

Perfect for both single-player and servers!



✔ **Effects & Animations** – Cool particle mods, motion effects, and visuals

✔ **Variety – Tons** of resource packs (enable whichever you like!)

✔ **Convenience** – Optimized mods and settings for smoother gameplay



(Leave your feedback on our [Discord server!](https://discord.gg/BWFMb7ZX2j))
